composition_notes: Player positioned left-of-center in searching/uncertain pose creates visual tension with tools clustered right in descending diagonal (top-right to bottom-right). This asymmetry mirrors the mission crisis: lost direction vs. navigation solutions. Tools form readable cascade without overlap, each 15%+ canvas width.
rationale: M13's 'fake map, darkness approaching, completely lost' demands urgent spatial problem-solving. Player at 28% left (facing right into frame) creates negative space for the tool cluster, which descends diagonally like a decision tree — ruler (basic/1pt) high, compass (medium/2pt) mid, drone (advanced/3pt) low. The diagonal flow guides eye from panic (player) to solutions (tools), matching the mission's 'find path NOW or all is lost' urgency.
